prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `27f8ce4f`.
codex_response:
Rule: find the most frequent color in the 3x3 input, then place full copies of the input into a 3x3 block output at those same cell positions, leaving all other blocks black. The summary hint was used; it matched all official examples, so I did not add a `notes.md`. No new primitive was needed.

Implemented the task package in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_27f8ce4f/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_27f8ce4f/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_27f8ce4f/generator.py#L12). The verifier is RE-ARC-style DSL composition. The generator stays close to the observed family by using 3x3 nonzero inputs, a unique dominant color with observed count patterns `(4,3,2)`, `(4,2,2,1)`, and `(3,2,2,1,1)`, and dominant-color placements that span at least two rows and two columns so the output layouts resemble the originals.

Validation passed: official examples `5/5`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looked on-family. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/27f8ce4f/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/27f8ce4f/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/27f8ce4f/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/27f8ce4f/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/27f8ce4f/previews/preview_03.png).
